caption: The video appears to be an educational presentation titled "The Elephant in the Mind," which uses the metaphor of an elephant to explore various aspects of human cognition and emotion. The central image features a large elephant with a person riding on its back, symbolizing the complex interplay between different brain functions. Surrounding this central image are four smaller images of brain scans, each highlighting a specific area of the brain associated with different mental processes: open-mindedness (PC), subjective value (VMPFC), fear (Amygdalae), and control (DLPFC). These images suggest that the video aims to explain how these distinct brain regions contribute to our thoughts, feelings, and behaviors, possibly emphasizing the importance of understanding and managing these cognitive and emotional elements for better decision-making and mental well-being.
